next_assets_to_generate.name: URAI Home World Core Environment
next_assets_to_generate.recommended_reason: First spend bucket. Needs navigable terrain, sky framing, branded hero composition.

next_assets_to_generate.name: Walkable Ground Terrain
next_assets_to_generate.recommended_reason: Must feel physically reachable from Home, not a separate page.

next_assets_to_generate.name: Galaxy / Life Map Sky Dome
next_assets_to_generate.recommended_reason: Must read as looking up into the life-map sky.

next_assets_to_generate.name: Portal System: Ground, Life Map, Focus, Replay
next_assets_to_generate.recommended_reason: Portal interaction must feel like spatial travel, not a flat button.

next_assets_to_generate.name: Memory Star Node Model
next_assets_to_generate.recommended_reason: Needs hover, tap, selected, and opened states.

next_assets_to_generate.name: Focus Star-Entry Tunnel
next_assets_to_generate.recommended_reason: Must connect from selected star to memory chamber.

next_assets_to_generate.name: Replay Film Object
next_assets_to_generate.recommended_reason: Should feel like opening a memory film, not pressing play on a normal page.

recommended_spend_order: 1. Core world kit: Home world, Ground terrain, sky dome, portals.
2. Interaction kit: memory stars, hover/tap FX, focus tunnel, particles.
3. Cinematic kit: replay film object, memory chamber, loading world, passport/status room.
4. Polish variants: upgraded materials, biomes, avatars, room props, texture replacements.
